Figure 5: Representative error cases. Left: a model retrieves the correct clip with a detailed caption but fails with a shorter user-style query. Right: a unified query requires matching both the visual scene and the audio event; the model retrieves a visually similar clip but ignores the mismatched audio cue.
Figure 11: Prompt for caption degeneration checking.

Table 5: Ablation A (detailed R@1/5/10): Clip-level retrieval metrics of single-modal media against unified text, under both caption and query regimes. Video-level results are already summarized by R@1 in Table 4. Bold indicates best per column within each media group.
